text_block_list.name: Fans
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Fans
text_block_list.text: Kitasaaan! Kitasan Black!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We're on the bus to summer camp, and fans have
gathered all around it.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: I'm so grateful that I have this many fans, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
But I can't afford to let myself get carried away!
I've gotta keep pushing forward with all I've got!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Despite all the praise she's been getting, I don't
need to worry about things going to her head.
She's been taught to be humble since childhood.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Fsshhh... fsshhh...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Upon arriving at the camp grounds, Kitasan Black
falls into a contemplative state while watching
the ocean waves.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Placing first in the popularity poll... Placing first,
huh? Popularity sure is a strange thing.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
It's not related to one's strength or achievements.
Being strong doesn't automatically make you
popular, and being weak doesn't necessarily
mean you're nameless.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
I don't think my running is up to snuff yet,
though, if I'm aiming to be the most popular
Umamusume!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Being celebrated by so many people while
knowing I still have room to grow makes me feel a
little weird...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Where she used to have few fans, she now has
innumerable supporters. Kitasan Black appears
uncertain about how to deal with her newfound
popularity.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I have to help her change her perspective so she
can get a clearer look at things.
choice_data_list:
Just think of it as them expecting great things
from you in the future.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Um... I'm not sure I get what you mean.
choice_data_list:
Maybe they're excited to see what you will do
rather than what you've already done.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Oh... I think I get it! Looking at it from that angle
makes me feel better!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Rather than convince everyone I'm great now, I
should make them see my future potential
instead! That's what you meant, right?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It appears my words of support helped her sort
out her feelings.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
But expectations are just that. It doesn't mean
I've managed to put smiles on anyone's faces yet.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
That's why I've got to polish up my skills this
summer, so I can live up my fans' expectations!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
So don't hold back and throw everything you've
got at me during training! Let's make a splash as
big as a crashing wave!
